description: Rate limiting may impact integration testing
correction: For development/testing: Temporarily disable rate limiting by setting high thresholds in .env (API_RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS=1000) or add test bypass middleware. For production: Keep current limits (5 auth/15min, 10 register/hour)

description: In-memory database not suitable for production
correction: Set USE_IN_MEMORY_DB=false in .env and provide valid MONGODB_URI. Verify MongoDB connection before deployment. Alternative: Configure MongoDB Atlas with proper authentication and IP whitelist

description: JWT token expiry (7 days) requires client-side refresh handling
correction: Implement token refresh mechanism in Flutter app. Catch 401 AUTH_INVALID_TOKEN errors and prompt re-login. Consider reducing JWT_EXPIRY to 24h for better security and implementing refresh tokens

description: Request logging creates large log files in production
correction: Monitor logs/combined.log and logs/error.log disk usage. Implement log archival strategy (compress old logs). Consider reducing LOG_LEVEL to 'warn' in production. Set up log rotation policy (current: 5MB per file, 5 file retention)

description: Health check endpoint memory reporting may differ between environments
correction: Use /api/v1/health for basic connectivity checks only. For production monitoring, implement comprehensive APM (Application Performance Monitoring). Monitor database connection readiness separately

description: Flutter frontend needs backend API integration points
correction: Connect Flutter app to backend at: 1) Auth: POST /api/v1/auth/register, /api/v1/auth/login. 2) Translations: POST /api/v1/translations (create), GET /api/v1/translations (retrieve). 3) Set Authorization header: 'Bearer {token}' for authenticated endpoints

description: ML model integration with backend needs coordination
correction: 1) TensorFlow Lite inference runs locally in Flutter. 2) Send results to backend via POST /api/v1/translations. 3) Include confidence scores (0-1 range) in payload. 4) Verify XSS escaping; backend sanitizes input automatically

description: Jest test suite has token persistence issues
correction: Use integration test script (test_sprint5_integration.js) instead of Jest for full E2E testing. Jest tests work for individual endpoint validation. For comprehensive testing: run script, then Jest with --forceExit flag to prevent hanging

description: XSS escaping may double-escape user content in some cases
correction: Verify that frontend doesn't double-escape escaped content. When retrieving translations from API, content is already escaped; render as-is without additional escaping in Flutter

description: No caching mechanism for frequently accessed translations
correction: Implement local caching in Flutter app for retrieved translations. On backend: Consider Redis caching layer for translation lookups. Current design: No caching; fresh query for each GET request
